title: arnica alpina var. attenuata
intro: Arnica alpina var. attenuata, also known as mountain arnica, is a plant species in the sunflower family, characterized by its white or pale yellow flowers and hairy leaves. The medicinal properties of Arnica alpina var. attenuata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. The health benefits of using Arnica alpina var. attenuata include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and enhancing the body's immune response. Arnica alpina var. attenuata can be used in various herbal preparations, such as topical creams, ointments, and salves, as well as tinctures and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
